name: What's average payout for mild silicosis in Utah?

mainEntity.name: What's average payout for mild silicosis in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: **$50K-$250K for mild, covering meds/wages; severe $500K+.** Factors impairment, age[4]. Key factors: Rating 10-30% mild; future risks. Settlements confidential. Use comp calculator. Free case review values yours.
